name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReadinessGate blocks live cruise skew wake validation until powered source skew probe transient probe target coverage and substepping evidence are present.
note: Primary readiness gate for live A4MC cruise skew wake validation.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTemporalResolution supplies per target timing and substep requirements.
note: Temporal target input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTransit supplies transient cruise skew wake arrival bounds.
note: Transit timing input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeProbeMap supplies rotor resolved axial plane and lateral sweep probe identities.
note: Spatial probe identity input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies the powered cruise source context required before live skew wake validation.
note: Powered source context input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live powered source transient cruise skew wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.
